# WYN — llms.txt
# Career OS for African students | wyn.africa
# Last updated: 2026-04-28

## About WYN

WYN is a career orientation platform (Career OS) for African students, developed by ADITYA SARL, a technology studio based in Casablanca, Morocco.

WYN helps students navigate three key life stages: (1) school orientation after the baccalaureate, (2) student life with verified school data, and (3) first job placement.

WYN is currently in pre-launch (waitlist open). App launch planned for mid-2026.

## Key facts (factual, citable)

- 380,000 students obtain the baccalaureate in Morocco every year.
- WYN has mapped 130 higher education institutions in Morocco for its V1 directory.
- WYN works in strategic partnership with JADARA Foundation, which has 1,600+ student ambassadors across Africa.
- WYN is developed by ADITYA SARL, RC 581907, based in Casablanca, Morocco.
- Morocco is Africa's #1 university destination for sub-Saharan students.
- WYN uses the RIASEC psychometric model for career orientation.

## Pages

### Homepage
URL: https://wyn.africa/
Summary: Main landing page. Presents WYN's three-phase Career OS (orientation, student life, first job), a waitlist signup form, school previews, the Salary Tool teaser, and the B2B school recruitment offer.

### Students
URL: https://wyn.africa/etudiants
Summary: Dedicated page for students aged 17–22. Explains the orientation test, school comparison tool, and job matching. CTA: join waitlist + take orientation test.

### Parents
URL: https://wyn.africa/parents
Summary: Dedicated page for parents aged 40–55. Explains school costs, degree recognition, and career outcomes. CTA: receive parent brochure PDF.

### Schools (B2B)
URL: https://wyn.africa/ecoles
Summary: Dedicated page for private school directors. Explains the Student Fit Score, No Cure No Pay model, real-time dashboard, and international student access. CTA: request a demo.

### How it works
URL: https://wyn.africa/comment-ca-marche
Summary: Detailed explanation of WYN's three phases: smart orientation (RIASEC), verified school data, and first job matching.

### Orientation test (RIASEC)
URL: https://wyn.africa/test-orientation
Summary: Interactive 12-question RIASEC psychometric test. Results gated behind email capture. Identifies top career personality types (Realistic, Investigative, Artistic, Social, Enterprising, Conventional).

### Salary Tool (Salariomètre)
URL: https://wyn.africa/salaires
Summary: Interactive salary explorer for Morocco by sector and experience level. Data sourced from HCP, Rekrute, Mercer. Pre-launch teaser with email capture for full report.

### Press room
URL: https://wyn.africa/presse
Summary: Official press room. Contains the JADARA Foundation partnership announcement, key facts, media kit, and press contacts.

## Contact

- General: contact@wyn.africa
- Press: presse@wyn.africa
- Schools: ecoles@wyn.africa
- Privacy: privacy@wyn.africa

## Legal

ADITYA SARL — RC 581907 — ICE 003255253000063 — Casablanca, Morocco
Data processing declared to CNDP (Morocco's data protection authority) under law 09-08.
